sutta:
now brahmin januszoni approached the exalted 1 greeted him and after exchanging the usual polite talk sat down at 1 side so seated he said master gautama what's a noble's aim what's his quest what's his resolve what's his want what's his ideal just stop here for a moment to explain snowball is a member of the warrior cast in in bali it's katya in sanskrit is shatriya 1 of the 4 castes in india now the sutra continues brahman wells a noble's aim wisdoms his quest powers his resolve the earth's his want dominions is ideal and the brahmin asked again anabra means master gautama what's his aim his quest etc and the buddha said who else is aim wisdoms his quest mantras are his resolve sacrifices his want brahma world is his ideal again the brahmin asked and a householders what's his aim his quest etc master gautama and the buddha said wealth his aim wisdoms his quest crafts his resolve works his want works and is his ideal again the brahmin asked and a woman's master gautama what's her aim her quest etc buddha said man's her aim adornments a quest a son's resolve to be without a rival is her want dominion is her ideal and a thief's aim a thief's quest etc master gautama bhutis his aim captures his quest caravans his resolve darkness is his want not to be seen is his ideal anna recluse master gautama what's his aim his quest etc patience and forbearance are his aim wisdoms his quest virtues is resolved nothing is his want ibana is his ideal wonderful wonderful master gotama verily master gautama knows the aim the quest the resolve the 1 the ideal of nobles of brahmins householders women thieves and recluses this is indeed wonderful master gautama and so the brahmana refuge in the buddha and um said that so henceforth till life ends i will go to the master gautama for help and that's the uh end of the suit this is uh an interesting suta i chose the witne of the buddha the ability of the buddha to answer questions and you can see the answers he gave are quite interesting as far as monks are concerned the things mentioned by the buddha are of interest to among patients and forbearance are amongst aim wisdoms amongst quests which u is his resolve nothing is his want and ibana is his ideal


===== SOURCE: 059_Anguttara Nikaya Book 6E 6655 - 6657 by Bhante Hye Dhammavuddho Mahathera.txt =====
